Title: Super Stock Build (PS5)

Body (HTML): The full competitive FPS setup. Smart Triggers, Smart Bumpers, two Rear Buttons, and drift-resistant sticks on a genuine DualSense base. Tuned for fast-paced shooters where milliseconds matter. 5-year stick warranty.

Title: TMR Module — DualSense Edge
Body (HTML): TMR hall-effect replacement joystick module for the DualSense Edge. Magnetic sensing, zero wear, zero drift — calibrated out of the box. 0 latency vs stock modules, 50 million+ cycle lifespan.
